steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The contrast word Unlike signals that Takeuchi Seihu's approach differed from Asai Chū's. The evidence sentence confirms that Takeuchi actually used traditional Japanese methods (color pigments on silk), establishing that he took a positive stance toward these approaches.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Embraced directly captures this stance — to embrace traditional Japanese approaches means to wholeheartedly adopt and support them. Distrusted and overlooked contradict the evidence (suggesting rejection), while released is contextually irrelevant. That matches choice C — C is correct.
